title: MoonLaunch
description: A perfectly optimized modpack for SMP servers
body:
![MoonLaunch Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc57543073f56399b40ee812888b7e371891bdcd.png)
## About modpack
This modpack is created for comfortable play on SMP servers. Optimizes Minecraft and contains various improvements aimed at improving the convenience of interaction with the game. Suitable for both single player and other servers. Made with love :)

## Mods
This modpack contains **38 mods**. Among the most popular:
- [PlasmoVoice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice)
- [EmoteCraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)

...and 30 more different **client-side** modifications

You can safely add your own mods to this modpack, everything will work fine

## Resourcepacks and shaders
Also modpack contains **5 shaders and resourcepacks**. Full list:
- [Complementrary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
- [Complementrary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)
- [Photon Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)
- [Low on Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-on-fire)
- [Translations for Sodium](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium)

## Ready for play on SMP
Everything is already done for you - you just download the modpack, add your favorite server and start playing!

Also, this modpack contains all emotes from [SPEmotes](https://spemotes.com/download/)
